---
title: Data Engineering
highlight-style: atom-one
listing:
  contents:
    - data-eng
  sort: "date asc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  page-size: 10
image-align: left
page-layout: full
css: assets/listing.css
description: "Notes and tutorials on data engineering — anchored by an 8-part Apache Airflow series covering DAGs, scheduling, templating, task dependencies, and best practices."
---
